title: Ben Farrar
extract: Ben Farrar (born 2 December 1986) is an Australian former professional rugby league footballer. He is the player/head coach of New York RL. He previously played for the North Queensland Cowboys and Manly-Warringah Sea Eagles in the National Rugby League and the Catalans Dragons in the Super League. He primarily played fullback, centre, wing but had filled in at five-eighth in the past.
